---
title: "Persistent inequalities in PM2.5 Exposure: Santiago (2022-2024)
subtitle: "Statistical analysis: tables and figures"
date: 28-01-2026
format: html
---

## 1. Introduction

explicar que es esto

## 2.1 Annual statistics
Overview of the entire study perior (2022-2024)

```{r}
#| label: tbl-annual
#| echo: false
#| message: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

#Read the RDS file 
table_annual <- read_rds("../output/tables/tabla_1_anual.rds")

#Create table
table_annual %>%
    gt() %>%
    tab_header(
        title = "Table 1: blabla",
        subtitle = "blabla"
    ) %>%
    # Format numbers to 1 decimal place
     fmt_number(colums = c(Mean, SD, Min, Max, P98), decimals = 1) %>%
    #Rename columns for display
    cols_label(
    comuna = "Municipality",
    anio = "Year",
    p_value = "p-value",
    N_days = "Valid Days"
 )

```

REVISAR TODOOO
